menu.name: Chicken Biryani
menu.description: Fragrant basmati rice cooked with succulent chicken, spiced potato, and a boiled egg, infused with saffron and subtle spices.

menu.name: Mutton Rezala
menu.description: A classic Mughlai dish featuring tender mutton simmered in a rich, yogurt-based gravy with cashew paste and aromatic spices.

menu.name: Phirni
menu.description: Creamy rice pudding flavored with green cardamom, saffron, and pistachios, served chilled in a traditional earthen pot.

menu.name: Margherita Pizza
menu.description: Classic sourdough base topped with rich tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella cheese, fresh basil leaves, and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil.

menu.name: Pepperoni Feast
menu.description: Loaded with double portions of premium pepperoni and mozzarella on a hand-tossed thin crust.

menu.name: Garlic Breadsticks
menu.description: Warm, oven-baked breadsticks brushed with garlic butter and herbs, served with a creamy cheese dip.

menu.name: Masala Dosa
menu.description: Crispy fermented rice crepe filled with a savory potato masala, served with coconut chutney and piping hot sambar.

menu.name: Chicken Chettinad
menu.description: A fiery South Indian chicken curry cooked with fresh-ground coconut and roasted Chettinad spices.

menu.name: Filter Coffee
menu.description: Traditional South Indian drip-brewed chicory coffee mixed with frothed hot milk, served in a brass tumbler.
